BaseBrakeSampleCount.Description: Number of brake samples. If 0, all samples to min speed

SensorTestStartDelay.Description: Time allowed for roller to get to speed

SensorSpeedDriverDelay.Description: Time allowed for operator to prepare vehicle

SensorSpeedShiftPrompt.Description: Prompt driver to shift to drive

SensorSpeedShiftPromptDelay.Description: Time allowed for operator to shift to Drive

BrakeBurnishCycles.Description: Number of times to perform the brake burnish cycle

BurnishIterations.Description: Number of times to accel and decel for one cycle

EPBBurnishCycles.Description: Number of times to perform the brake burnish cycle

EPBBurnishIterations.Description: Number of times to accel and decel for one cycle

CheckPartNumber.Description: Verify module part number matches broadcast

StartModuleKeepAlive.Description: Start sending tester present message to the module

StopModuleKeepAlive.Description: Stop sending tester present message to the module

LearnPerformanceType.Description: Command the module to learn the performance type

Initialize.Description: Initialize the BaseBrake portion of the test

AccelerateToBrakeSpeed.Description: Accelerate to Brake Test Arm Speed

TestSteps.AccelerateToBrakeSpeed: Accelerate to Brake Test Arm Speed

DragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test

AnalyzeDragTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Drag Test Analysis

AnalyzeBrakeTest.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Test Analysis

AnalyzeBalance.Description: Base Brake Component Brake Balance Test

BrakeToStop.Description: Prompt the driver to brake to stop

ValveFiringTest.Description: Cycle the valves to perform reduction recovery testing

EvaluateABS.Description: Evaluate ABS pulses to ensure minimum requirements are met

EvaluateESP.Description: Evaluate ESP pulses to ensure minimum requirements are met

CheckUplineProcessByte.Description: Check the status of the evac/fill procedure

ReadSensorSpeeds.Description: Just read the wheel speed sensors from the ABS module

IgnitionOff.Description: Wait for the ignition to be turned off

IgnitionOn.Description: Wait for the ignition to be turned on

EvaluateSensorCross.Description: Check for ABS wheel speed sensor cross

ReadSpeedDeltas.Description: Read the deceleration rates from the ABS module

CheckPedalStatusForBrakeTest.Description: Make sure brake is off and throttle is closed in prep for brake testing

ElectricParkBrake.Description: Verify park brake is properly adjusted

DumpAndIsolateAllWheels.Description: Dump brake pressure at all wheels

RecoverAllWheels.Description: Recover brake force at all wheels

CycleIgnition.Description: Cycle ignition off and then on

Delay.Description: Wait for the specified amount of time
